description: The 'ginger' commodity case-study questions used in Chapter 3 as a focused qualitative probe. Source: pipeline/06_query/eval_improved.py (GINGER_QUESTIONS).

questions.label: Ginger
questions.question: How much ginger did the British Caribbean colonies export between 1696 and 1755, and how did volumes change over time?

questions.label: Ginger
questions.question: Why was ginger one of the most traded Caribbean commodities by volume, yet it receives little attention in contemporary accounts compared to sugar?

questions.label: Ginger
questions.question: How was ginger cultivated and processed in the Caribbean, and how did its labour requirements compare to sugar production?

questions.label: Ginger
questions.question: How did Caribbean ginger compete with East Indian ginger in European markets?

questions.label: Ginger
questions.question: What explanations do the sources offer for the decline of ginger exports from the Caribbean after the 1730s?
